title: Kosteletzkya tampicensis
taxonomy: Kosteletzkya tampicensis is classified within the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the mallow or hibiscus family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its relationships with other species. The genus Kosteletzkya is a group of flowering plants native to the Americas, and Kosteletzkya tampicensis is one of its species. Within the family Malvaceae, Kosteletzkya tampicensis is placed in the tribe Malveae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
